mapper.sql: CASE WHEN o.status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION' AND o.expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) THEN 'EXPIRED' ELSE o.status END

o.id, o.user_id, o.product_id, o.equipment_unit_id, o.source_reservation_id, o.status, AS effective_status, o.start_date, o.end_date, o.expires_at, o.product_name, o.product_model, o.equipment_display_code, o.currency, o.pricing_version, o.pricing_rule, o.billing_days, o.daily_rate, o.rental_amount, o.deposit_amount, o.total_amount, o.rounding_mode, o.created_at, o.confirmed_at, o.received_at, o.cancelled_at, o.expired_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) AS database_now
mapper.update: UPDATE order_idempotency SET status = 'COMPLETED', response_http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_code = #{responseCode}, response_body = #{responseBody}, resource_id = #{resourceId}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE order_idempotency SET status = 'FAILED', response_http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_code = #{responseCode}, response_body = #{responseBody}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_orders ( id, user_id, product_id, equipment_unit_id, source_reservation_id, status, start_date, end_date, expires_at, product_name, product_model, equipment_display_code, currency, pricing_version, pricing_rule, billing_days, daily_rate, rental_amount, deposit_amount, total_amount, rounding_mode, price_snapshot ) SELECT #{id}, r.user_id, r.product_id, r.equipment_unit_id, r.id, 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION', r.start_date, r.end_date, r.expires_at, p.name, p.model, eu.display_code, r.currency, r.pricing_version, r.pricing_rule, r.billing_days, r.daily_rate, r.rental_amount, r.deposit_amount, r.total_amount, r.rounding_mode, r.price_snapshot FROM inventory_reservations r JOIN products p ON p.id = r.product_id LEFT JOIN equipment_units eu ON eu.id = r.equipment_unit_id WHERE r.id = #{reservationId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
INSERT INTO order_status_history (id, order_id, from_status, to_status, reason) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM rental_orders o WHERE o.id = #{orderId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_orders SET status = 'RECEIVED', received_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'CONFIRMED' AND start_date <= DATE(CONVERT_TZ(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), '+00:00', '+08:00'))

UPDATE rental_orders SET status = 'CONFIRMED', confirmed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION' AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) AND start_date > DATE(CONVERT_TZ(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), '+00:00', '+08:00'))
UPDATE rental_orders SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION' AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
UPDATE rental_orders SET status = 'EXPIRED', expired_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION' AND expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, source_reservation_id FROM rental_orders WHERE status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION' AND expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) ORDER BY expires_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{batchSize} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED

SELECT id, user_id, expires_at FROM rental_orders WHERE status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION' AND confirmation_reminder_queued_at IS NULL AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) AND expires_at <= TIMESTAMPADD(MICROSECOND, #{leadTimeMillis} * 1000, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)) ORDER BY expires_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{batchSize} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_orders SET confirmation_reminder_queued_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PENDING_CONFIRMATION' AND confirmation_reminder_queued_at IS NULL AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
mapper.select: SELECT from_status, to_status, reason, created_at FROM order_status_history WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
